commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Therefore hear the counsel of the LORD, that he has taken against Edom; and his purposes, that he has purposed against the inhabitants of Teman: Surely the least of the flock shall draw them out: surely he shall make their habitations desolate with them. Chaldean, "chiefs of the people. "Tsáir (Haydock) is supposed to have this sense, Micheas v. (Calmet) But the weakest of the Chaldeans will be an overmatch for Edom.
